title: MPKV Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer Posts
description: The Mahatma Phule Krishi Vidyapeeth (MPKV) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy of 01 Medical Officer Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS and BAMS can apply for the MPKV Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, sal...
